item.title: Obfuskoder 1.0b6
item.description:
## Obfuskoder 1.0b6

**Automatic software updates.**

- Obfuskoder can now check for updates and install them for you. Choose how
  often in **Settings → Software Updates** — Daily, Weekly, **Monthly** (default),
  or Never — or check any time from **Obfuskoder → Check for Updates…**.
- Updates are Developer-ID signed, notarized, and cryptographically verified
  before installing.

*This is the release that turns auto-updates on: install it once (manually), and
future beta builds can update themselves in place.*

**Also**
- Obfuskoder is now open source under the MIT license.
